debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun p => rewardByCount A R p.1 (p.2 + 1)) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts: exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount_stationaryEnv h

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_forall_indepFun (by fun_prop)]
  exact indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic_all h

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq (fun p ↦ h.rewardByCount_ae_eq_eval p.1 (p.2 + 1)) ?_
  refine (iIndepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν).comp (fun p ↦ (p.2 + 1, p.1)) ?_ |>.comp_snd
  exact fun p1 p2 hp ↦ by simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using hp

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq ?_ (fun p ↦ (rewardByCount_ae_eq_eval_stream h p.1 (p.2 + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero p.2)).symm)
  refine (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν).comp (fun p ↦ (p.2 + 1, p.1))
    (fun p q h_eq ↦ by simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using h_eq) |>.comp_measurable measurable_snd

have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  rw [iIndepFun_iff_forall_finite]
  intro s
  rw [indepFun_iff_pi_fi_indepFun]
  · intro ⟨a, n⟩; exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h a n
  · sorry

have : Countable (α × ℕ) := by infer_instance
  exact iIndepFun_of_identDistrib_eval (fun p ↦ p.2) (fun p ↦ p.1) (identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h)
(h.identDistrib_rewardByCount_streamMeasure).iIndepFun (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν)
exact IsAlgEnvSeq.iIndepFun_rewardByCount h

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq ?_ (fun p ↦ (rewardByCount_ae_eq_eval h p.1 (p.2 + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)).symm)
  apply iIndepFun_snd_prod
  exact (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν).reindex (fun p ↦ (p.2 + 1, p.1)) (fun _ _ h ↦ by simpa using h)
exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval_stream h).iIndepFun (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν)
exact h.identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream.iIndepFun (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval ν)

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq ((measurePreserving_snd (μ := P) (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)).iIndepFun
    (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval ν)) (fun p ↦ (h.rewardByCount_ae_eq_eval_snd p.1 (p.2 + 1) (by simp)).symm)
h.iIndepFun_rewardByCount_stationaryEnv

rw [iIndepFun_iff_map_eq_pi]
  · rw [h.map_rewardByCount]
    simp_rw [← (hasLaw_rewardByCount h _ _ (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)).map_eq]
  · exact fun p ↦ (measurable_rewardByCount h.measurable_A h.measurable_R _ _).aemeasurable
h.iIndepFun_rewardByCount_stationaryEnv

simp_rw [h.rewardByCount_eq_eval]
  exact iIndepFun_comp_snd ((Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval ν).comp (fun p ↦ (p.2 + 1, p.1))
    (fun _ _ ↦ by simp [Prod.ext_iff])) P
exact h.hasLaw_rewardByCount_stream.iIndepFun

rw [iIndepFun_pi_iff]
  intro a
  exact iIndepFun_rewardByCount' h a

refine (iIndepFun_ae_eq (fun p ↦ h.rewardByCount_ae_eq_eval p.1 (p.2 + 1))).mpr ?_
  exact (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval ν).comp_snd.reindex (fun p ↦ (p.2 + 1, p.1))
    (fun _ _ h ↦ by simp [Prod.ext_iff] at h; exact Prod.ext h.2 (Nat.succ.inj h.1))
exact h.identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream.iIndepFun (Bandit.iIndepFun_stream ν)
h.hasLaw_rewardByCount_streamMeasure_prod.iIndepFun
exact h.identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream.iIndepFun (Bandit.iIndepFun_stream' ν)

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq ?_ (fun p ↦ (h.rewardByCount_ae_eq_stream p.1 (p.2 + 1)).symm)
  exact (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure ν).comp (fun p ↦ (p.2 + 1, p.1))
    (fun _ _ h_eq ↦ by simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using h_eq) |>.comp_snd
exact h.iIndepFun_rewardByCount_p
exact (identDistrib_rewardByCount_stream h).iIndepFun (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν)

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq ?_ (fun p ↦ (h.rewardByCount_ae_eq_eval p.1 (p.2 + 1)).symm)
  refine (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval ν).comp_measurePreserving measurePreserving_snd |>.reindex ?_
  intro p1 p2 h_eq; ext <;> simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq (fun p ↦ h.rewardByCount_ae_eq_eval p.1 (p.2 + 1) (by simp)) ?_
  exact (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_streamMeasure ν).comp_snd.comp (fun p ↦ (p.2 + 1, p.1))
    (fun p q h_eq ↦ by simpa [Prod.ext_iff] using h_eq)

refine iIndepFun.ae_eq ?_ (fun p ↦ (h.rewardByCount_ae_eq_snd_eval p.1 p.2.succ (by simp)).symm)
  exact (iIndepFun_prod_right (Bandit.iIndepFun_eval_eval ν)).comp (fun p ↦ (p.2.succ, p.1))
    (fun p q h_eq ↦ by simp [Prod.ext_iff] at h_eq; exact ⟨h_eq.2, h_eq.1⟩)
exact h.iIndepFun_rewardByCount

rw [iIndepFun_iff_measure_map_eq_pi]
  · rw [Bandit.streamMeasure_eq_pi ν]
    exact map_rewardByCount_eq_streamMeasure h
  · exact fun p ↦ (hasLaw_rewardByCount h p.1 (p.2 + 1) (by simp)).aemeasurable
exact h.iIndepFun_rewardByCount_stationaryEnv
exact h.hasLaw_rewardByCount_streamMeasure.iIndepFun.comp_fun Prod.swap Prod.swap_injective
